notes: Grid-connected terrestrial DC; energy is purchased from grid at 150 USD/MWh; base CAPEX from LCOC paper baseline.
Off-grid terrestrial DC; base DC CAPEX plus PV and battery storage included in CAPEX; no grid energy purchase.
Orbital DC; future/under-todays-assumptions case based on 1 GW constellation cost estimate; no grid electricity; short LEO lifetime.
